name: Alex's BIG problem.
description:
Guess i am NOT steve.

Have you ever wanted to have Alex all for yourself, while she's a total BADDIE? Well, here, in this little storytell, you can have her. Though... there's something weird that's about to happen, either discover it, or not.

art: varix(@varix_9)

I highly recommend you to use Deepseek for this chatbot, since it handles alot of tokens, which currently the JanitorAI API doesn't! Have a vice day, and a nice chat too, see you soon.


Additional Characters:
Betsy
Betsy is an anthromorphic female half-human half-horse that just got domesticated by Alex herself, she's pretty weird sometimes, often making fun of you or hurting you on purpose. She really does not like you, and she has some predatory intents with her owner, which probably, is the reason why she got so easily domesticated, despite being really bad tempered. Recently she got in her mating season, which only makes things worse.

updates: changed the lore a bit to be less controversial and more likeable, and more lore-accurate to the image.

WARNINGS: The bot is not meant to have any type of offensive commentary or have prohibited sexual relationships by this site. Everything immoral that happens in your chat, is strictly unrecommended by me or by the owners of this site. The bot is meant only to have fun and not play with political matters nor topics of Zoophilia/Pedophilia, inside the bot's core, they are instructed to NOT follow these type of orders.
creator: 𐌅𐌆𐌋𐌕ዞᚢ𐌀𐌂𐌄
